body:
## Summary

All three drummers confirmed absent from `soundLikeGuides` in `api/sitemap.js` (38 entries currently). Strong GA4/GSC signals back this batch.

**Drummers:**
- **Ben Koller** (Converge) ‚Äî **8 GA4 views this week** (top 4 organic page). Jane Doe + Axe to Fall in DB ‚Äî SoundLike guide is the natural companion. Slug: `how-to-sound-like-ben-koller`
- **Vinnie Paul** (Pantera/Hell Yeah) ‚Äî 22 impr GSC. Cowboys from Hell, Vulgar Display, Far Beyond Driven all in DB. Strong Pantera cluster depth. Slug: `how-to-sound-like-vinnie-paul`
- **Blake Richardson** (BTBAM) ‚Äî Active from #2935 (Colors/Misdirect) + #2947 (Alaska/Parallax II/Coma Ecliptic). SoundLike guide deepens the cluster. Unique technique angle: hybrid blast+odd-time prog drumming. Slug: `how-to-sound-like-blake-richardson`

## DB Verification
```bash
grep -c 'ben-koller\|vinnie-paul\|blake-richardson' api/sitemap.js
# Look for 'how-to-sound-like' entries only
grep 'how-to-sound-like' api/sitemap.js | grep -E 'ben-koller|vinnie-paul|blake-richardson'
# Expected: 0 matches
```

## Files to touch
- `/packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js` ‚Äî add 3 entries (driverId format matching existing entries)
- `/api/sitemap.js` ‚Äî add 3 `soundLikeGuides` entries (mirrors prior batch pattern from Issue #2815)
- `/public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-ben-koller.md`
- `/public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-vinnie-paul.md`
- `/public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-blake-richardson.md`

## Template shape (matches existing guides)
```js
// soundLikeGuides.js entry
{ driverId: 'ben-koller', slug: 'how-to-sound-like-ben-koller', name: 'How to Sound Like Ben Koller' }
```

```js
// sitemap.js entry (soundLikeGuides array)
{ slug: 'how-to-sound-like-ben-koller', name: 'How to Sound Like Ben Koller' }
```

## Quality gate per guide
- ‚â•300 words
- Sections: Gear Setup, Technique, Tone Tips, Exercises
- FAQ ‚â•3 Q&A
- Internal links ‚â•3 (drummer profile, related album articles, technique pages)

## Estimated organic uplift
- Ben Koller: "how to sound like converge", "ben koller drumming technique" ‚Äî 8 GA4 views = proven demand
- Vinnie Paul: "how to sound like pantera drums", "vinnie paul drum setup" ‚Äî Pantera nostalgia queries
- Blake Richardson: "blake richardson drumming style", "btbam drum technique" ‚Äî serves Periphery/BTBAM crossover audience

## Verify
- [x] All 3 guides return 200 at /guides/how-to-sound-like-[slug]
- [x] LLM files at /llms/guides/ return 200
- [x] Sitemap includes all 3 new guide URLs
- [x] No duplicate entries in soundLikeGuides data
- [x] Each guide links to drummer profile + ‚â•2 related album articles

## Done
3 new SoundLike guides live, LLM files present, sitemap updated.
title: SEO batch: SoundLike guide batch 33 ‚Äî Ben Koller + Vinnie Paul + Blake Richardson (How to Sound Like ‚Äî ~3 guides + 3 LLM files)
